common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete?

admin.resetDesc: This will wipe all rates, carriers/suppliers, upload logs, and parse cache while keeping the port dictionary. Demo only and cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Rate Management Dashboard
dashboard.uploadRatesDesc: Supports KMTC, NVO FAK, and other Excel formats
dashboard.browseRatesDesc: Search, filter, and manage all rate records
dashboard.compareRatesDesc: Compare quotes from multiple suppliers on the same lane

compare.title: Lane Comparison
compare.missingPorts: Please select both origin and destination ports
compare.noData: No rate data is available for this lane

upload.title: Rate Data Import
upload.noRatesExtracted: No rate data could be extracted
upload.pasteEmailFirst: Please paste the email text first
upload.parseInboxFailed: Failed to analyze the email body
upload.parseAttachmentFailed: Failed to analyze the attachment image
upload.excelDragText: Click or drag an Excel file here
upload.excelHint: Supported formats: KMTC sheets, NVO FAK, and other structured Excel files
upload.excelHint2: The system will detect the file type automatically and parse rate data
upload.inboxInfo: Fetch recent corporate emails in one click. AI will identify rate data directly from quoted email bodies.
upload.inboxInfoDesc: This uses the IMAP mailbox already configured in Email Search & AI Analysis, so no manual copy-paste is required. Support for body images and image attachments will be added next.
upload.clickFetchInbox: Click the button above to fetch emails
upload.emailTextInfo: Upload a local Outlook .msg file, or paste a rate quote email below — AI will extract structured rate data.
upload.emailPlaceholder:
Paste email text here...

Example: Evergreen week 12 updated rates are as follows...
upload.msgDragText: Click or drag a .msg email file here
upload.msgHint: Supports locally exported Outlook .msg files. Both body and image attachments will be parseable.
upload.wechatInfo: Upload a WeChat or QQ screenshot and AI will extract rate details from the conversation.
upload.wechatContextPlaceholder: Optional context, for example: KMTC quote from Shanghai to India
upload.imageDragText: Click or drag a screenshot here
upload.imageHint2: AI will extract rate information from the screenshot
upload.successSubtitle: Imported {{imported}} rate records out of {{parsed}} parsed records

pkg.title: Bid Package Auto Fill
pkg.subtitle: Upload a customer tender template in Excel. AI will parse the lane structure, match rates from the database, and fill the sheet automatically.
pkg.uploadDragText: Click or drag a tender template Excel file here
pkg.uploadHint: Supports .xlsx / .xls files, such as Customer A quotation templates
pkg.noRateWarning: {{count}} lanes could not be matched to any rate
pkg.parseSummary: Tender period: {{period}} | Sheet: {{sheet}} | {{sections}} origin sections | {{lanes}} lanes

email.title: Email Search & AI Analysis
email.description: Search emails from the real mailbox and generate timeline-based analysis from the result set.
email.searchPlaceholder:
Enter a search query that can span Chinese, Japanese, and English...
For example: Retrieve Toyota-related emails and summarize them by timeline
email.connecting: Connecting to mailbox and building index...
email.notIndexed: No email index yet. Please connect the mailbox and build the index first.
email.subject: Subject

templates.timeline: Retrieve Toyota-related emails and summarize them by timeline
templates.rateChanges: What rate changes happened recently and which customers were affected?
templates.projectProgress: How is the Mitsubishi Electric tender progressing?
